name: Euclid's Elements Book I — Propositions 11–20
description: Dependency graph for Propositions 11–20 of Euclid's Elements Book I. Right angles, straight lines, vertical angles, triangle exterior, triangle inequality. Shows how propositions depend on postulates (P1–P5), common notions (CN1–CN5), and prior propositions.
